element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Up to 6 different keys required in larger maps

element_introduction_order.element: Exotic weapons (flare gun, voodoo doll, flamethrower)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Secondary attack modes; alternate tactical approaches

element_introduction_order.element: Nuisance enemies (bats, rats, eels, possessed hands)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Crowd management; individually weak but dangerous en masse

element_introduction_order.element: Cabal human enemies and Tchernobog creatures
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Environmental cover usage and tactical positioning
Temporary combat advantage and tactical timing

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclic tension through combat encounters interspersed with exploration and puzzle-solving; difficulty noted by critics as occasionally punishing

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Super secret areas require exploration beyond obvious paths; rewards for curiosity
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden areas contain rewards; exploration-based discovery system

difficulty_curve.early_game: Foundation building with basic weapons, simple key/switch puzzles, nuisance enemy introduction
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Exotic weapon unlocks, environmental hazards intensify, larger maps with multiple key requirements, Cabal and creature encounters with cover tactics
difficulty_curve.late_game: Boss encounters, cumulative challenge combining all mechanics, demanding enemy formations
notable_spikes: Boss level difficulty relative to episode progression
Jumping puzzle sequences combined with enemy pressure
Critic feedback noted overall game difficulty as potentially punishing

notable_level_patterns.description: Campaign organized in episodes with multiple levels leading to boss encounter; each episode marks progression milestone
Maps scale from simple 1-2 key locks to complex 6-key requirement scenarios; spatial complexity correlates with progression
Sequences combining environmental dangers (lava, crushing blocks) with jumping puzzles; tests both spatial awareness and platforming skill
Distributed hidden spaces reward exploration with weapons, ammo, and power-ups; encourages non-linear discovery within linear framework
